gigapan.description:
Friday, 09/04, the City is in full bloom.  My city!
This took 46 minutes to capture all of the images. 
 but I'm not sure if this is 8/28, or 9/4...

You can watch sunset catch up, and pass the Gigapan robot, as the robot works one column at a time to catch the light, and the light works one arcsecond at a time to hide from the camera.

The light always wins.
